title: Bancho the Chef announced as a Dave the Diver prequel focused on cooking
contents_preview: As part of Sony's PlayStation State of Play showcase, Mintrocket, the team behind Dave the Diver revealed a prequel spin-off with Bancho the Chef. Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/06/bancho-the-chef-announced-as-a-dave-the-diver-prequel-focused-on-cooking/

title: Bancho the Chef Announce Trailer Out Now!
